---
title: "Rosalie Amelia Chichester"
---

## Rosalie Amelia Chichester

**Dates:** (1842/3-1908)

**Maiden name:** (Chamberlayne), Lady

### Description

daughter of Thomas Chamberlayne of Cranbury Park

### Biography

She married first (9 February 1865), Sir Alexander Palmer Bruce Chichester, 2nd Bt. (1842/3-1881), of Arlington Park, Devon, and secondly  (1883) his cousin Sir Arthur Chichester, 8th Bt. (1822/3-1898).

### Letters

- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from March 26th 1882
- Letter from Febry 10th 1865
- Letter from Febry 3d [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
